V-M-017.checks: Runtime sync applies incremental updates correctly. RU IP auto-update fetches from 3 sources with fallback, validates, and applies incrementally. Atomic ipset swap with rollback on failure. Last-known-good persistence survives service restart. Scheduler triggers update every 6 hours.
V-M-017.module-checks: pytest tests/test_ru_ipset_updater.py -v pytest tests/test_route_sync_runtime.py -v bash -n deploy/deploy-ru-server.sh ipset list ru_ips | wc -l (live server, must be >1000)

scenarios.scenario: All 3 sources return valid CIDR lists. ipset updated with diff-apply. entries >1000.
ipverse returns error. anti-zapret + ipgeobace used. ipset still updated.
All 3 sources return errors. last-known-good snapshot restored. No ipset changes.
All sources fail, no snapshot exists. Current ipset NOT touched. ERROR logged.
Source returns non-CIDR data. Source rejected. Fallback to next source.
Source returns <1000 entries. Source rejected as sanity failure.
Only 50 entries added, 20 removed. Exactly 70 ipset operations, NOT full flush.
Atomic swap succeeds. Old entries removed from memory after swap.
Atomic swap fails. ipset restored from last-known-good snapshot.
>20% of CIDRs changed. WARNING logged with old/new counts.
APScheduler triggers update every 6 hours (not 24h). Verified by mock clock.
Same data on second run. 0 ipset operations. No-op confirmed.
After successful update, /var/lib/krotvpn/ru_ips_snapshot.json exists and is valid JSON.
GET /routing/ru-ipset-stats returns entries count, last update time, sources used.

V-M-017.required-log-markers: [RuIpsetUpdater][fetch_sources][BLOCK] — source fetch result [RuIpsetUpdater][validate][BLOCK] — validation pass/fail [RuIpsetUpdater][apply_incremental][BLOCK] — add/remove counts [RuIpsetUpdater][fallback][BLOCK] — fallback triggered [RuIpsetUpdater][snapshot][BLOCK] — snapshot saved/restored [Routing][ipset][RU_IPSET_INCREMENTAL] — incremental apply result [Routing][ipset][RU_IPSET_SWAP_ROLLBACK] — rollback after swap failure [Routing][scheduler][RU_IPSET_UPDATE_COMPLETE] — scheduler trigger result
V-M-017.redaction: Never log source URLs with auth tokens (none expected, but validate). Never log full CIDR lists — only counts and sample IPs.

verification-level.level-1: S1-S6, S10-S13: Unit tests with mocked HTTP sources
verification-level.level-2: S7-S9: Integration tests with fake ipset (mocked subprocess)
verification-level.level-3: S14: Live server check — ipset list ru_ips | wc -l > 1000
